Hey guys, welcome to the 28 day meal plan section. We are going to explain how your nutrition is going to work for the next 28 days. Now let me say that one more time, this is for the next 28 days, not forever. Now on the meal plan, you're going to notice there's a list of proteins, carbs and vegetables. For the majority of your day, you're going to be having protein and vegetables in a meal. For men, you're going to be having six servings of the proteins listed. For women, it's going to be four. Now ideally you break this into three meals, but you can break it up however you want as long as you eat that throughout the day. Then you're going to notice there's a carb section. For the majority of meals, you will not have a carb there, but when you come to the back sheet, you will see that there's a refeed section. This is where you're going to get some carbs and have some fun. For some of you based on your BMI, you'll have two 45 minute windows spaced wherever you want in the week to essentially eat whatever you want. As long as you don't gorge yourself or feel sick, have fun. For some of you based on your BMI, you're going to get a lot more carbs and so you can have some heavier carb meals. Maybe it's pasta, maybe it's pizza, maybe it seems like that, but you can add from the carb list into your meal plan for those days. Then some of you don't get a lot of carbs and that's okay. If you're a little bit smaller, you get less food. Now if that seems complicated, we've included a calculator below that you can just put your information in and it'll tell you exactly how to process and do these refeed meals. The thing is, enjoy these refeed meals. You need to do them. They're fun. You should enjoy it. This meal plan is designed to have it. If you don't, you will not be following the meal plan. The rest is please consult your coach for any questions. The other thing that I want to let you know is this bundle that you purchased from Prestige is designed custom to make this 28 day meal plan work better for you. You can still have all the seasonings, all the foods you want that are zero calories in addition to whatever you're having. Enjoy your life. Enjoy the meal plan and see amazing results in the next 28 days.
